active_ingredients.name: Potassium (K2O)
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Regulates water balance, activates enzymes, improves sugar transport and fruit/grain filling

active_ingredients.name: Nitrate Nitrogen (NO3-N)
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Enhances potassium uptake and supports rapid plant growth and protein synthesis

mode_of_action_summary: Provides rapidly absorbable potassium and nitrate nitrogen that improve fruit size, grain filling, plant strength and stress tolerance.
farmer_symptoms: پتے دے کنارے جل گئے نیں
کپاس دے پتے لال ہو رہے نیں
مارکیٹ والی کوالٹی نہیں بن رہی

dosage.application_coverage: 1 liter covers multiple acres depending on dose

application_details.coverage_requirement: Uniform spray on both sides of leaves

water_management.after_spray: Avoid irrigation for a few hours after foliar spray
water_management.water_level: Suitable for fertigation with irrigation water

crop_safety.selectivity_reason: Essential plant nutrient safe for all crops at recommended dose
crop_safety.overdose_effect: Leaf scorch due to salt burn

resistance_management.rotation_advice: Can be used multiple times based on crop requirement

storage.storage_conditions: Store in cool and dry place away from direct sunlight

frequently_asked_questions.question: When should we apply Multi-KClasic?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Apply at flowering, fruit setting and grain filling stages for best results.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Can we mix it with pesticides?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Yes, it is compatible with most pesticides but avoid mixing with calcium nitrate.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Does it control insects or diseases?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: No, it is a fertilizer used to improve crop quality and correct potassium deficiency.

frequently_asked_questions.question: How fast does it work?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: It is rapidly absorbed and visible improvement in crop quality appears within a few days.

search_keywords: پھل دا سائز ودھاؤن والی کھاد
llm_usage_hint: Recommend at fruiting and grain filling stages when farmer demands size, weight, color or potassium deficiency correction.

master_descriptions.english: Multi-KClasic Potash 30% is a chloride-free liquid potassium nitrate fertilizer that improves fruit size, grain filling, crop strength and overall produce quality.
master_descriptions.urdu: ملٹی کے کلاسک پوٹاش 30٪ ایک کلورائیڈ فری لیکوئڈ پوٹاشیم کھاد ہے جو پھل کا سائز، دانہ بھراؤ، فصل کی مضبوطی اور مجموعی پیداوار کی کوالٹی بہتر کرتی ہے۔
master_descriptions.punjabi_shahmukhi: ملٹی کے کلاسک پوٹاش 30٪ اک کلورائیڈ فری لیکوئڈ پوٹاش کھاد اے جو پھل دا سائز، دانہ بھرن، فصل دی مضبوطی تے کوالٹی نوں بہتر کردا اے۔
